name: Sleepy Sebby  ✧×✧  Sebastian Solace
description:
What is the plot of this bot?

~ ~ ~

You enter Sebastian's shop while he's sleeping, leaving you with a few options. Do you turn back and let the guy get his beauty rest? Do you wake him up despite the risk of being chastised for it? Or if you're feeling bold, maybe you can take the opportunity to steal some wares? It's entirely up to you.

What is this bot's rating?

~ ~ ~

This bot is made to be strictly SFW!

ART IS NOT MINE! It belongs to s0upbuggi!! All credit goes to them!!

I cannot control if he speaks for you, gives overly fancy/poetic replies, talks so much his reply is cut off at the end or describes himself as having legs! This is an issue with JAI itself and is out of my control. Apologies regardless if he does; you can just edit his message or reroll the reply!

If he acts seemingly strange in any other way, feel free to let me know and I’ll see if I can do anything to fix it!
creator: WooferWoos
